name: image_histogram
description: Image histogram example for pict-section-histogram - drag and drop image analysis

scripts.build: npx quack build && npx quack copy

author: steven velozo <steven@velozo.com>

ExampleApplication.Title: Image Histogram
ExampleApplication.Summary: Drag-and-drop image analyzer that drives six independent histogram views (R/G/B/A, hue, luminosity) with per-bar gradient and rainbow coloring.
